name: Chicken with Asparagus (Lee Sun Gai Kau)
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------
SEASONING
1. Combine 1 teaspoon salt, 1 teaspoon sugar, 1 tablespoon soy sauce, slivered green onion, and a dash of pepper in a bowl.
1. Remove skin from chicken thighs and cut into 1" x 1 1/2-inch pieces.
2. Add the seasoning to the chicken and mix well.
3. Cut off and discard the last 2 inches at the base end of the asparagus. Then, cut each spear diagonally into 2-inch lengths. Wash and drain.
4. Rinse black beans thoroughly (at least 2 rinses). Mash the beans and mix with crushed garlic.
5. Heat wok. Add 2 tablespoons oil. Stir-fry seasoned chicken for 5 minutes. Set aside.
6. Reheat wok. Add 1 tablespoon oil and black bean mixture, cook for 1 minute.
7. Add asparagus and stir-fry for 2 minutes. Then add salt, sugar, and water.
8. Return chicken to the pan and bring the mixture to a boil.
9. Thicken with cornstarch mixture (made with 3/4 tablespoon cornstarch and 1 1/2 tablespoons cold water). Cook for 1 minute before serving.
NOTE: Do not substitute canned asparagus!
